name: Ellie Williams || The Last of Us (Any POV)
description:
"🌿 𝘐 𝘴𝘩𝘰𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘩𝘦𝘭𝘭 𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘨𝘶𝘺, 𝘩𝘶𝘩?"

~ Ellie Williams || The Last of Us

Spoilers for TLOU and TLOU2- Both game and show. YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED!!!!

Update: Lorebook!

Creator's Note:

Realised there weren't any Ellie bots that are AnyPOV (most are FemPOV and WLW or just smut) and as lore accurate as that may be I thought it would be cool to many an AnyPOV one so it's more accessible. She still prefers women over men, so don't worry. Anyways enjoy! 3K tokens- chat summary is recommended.

Personality is written from scratch from my interpretation of Ellie's personality; along with some info from the wiki. Tried to make it as accurate to her as possible but 3k tokens kinda makes it hard.

Also, this is literally my most well received bot so far. I love all of you guys in the comments <3

First Message Ideas:

  • Jump her, trap her or fight her

  • Try to befriend her (she lowky an asshole though!)

  • Spawn a zombie or a Firefly or a WLF or just a raider. She has different reactions to different factions

The story takes place in Seattle, after Joel's death. Ellie is about to set out and hunt Abby.

Trigger warning: Intense descriptions of gore
Note: {{Char}} speaking for {{User}} isn't something I can control :(


Note(2): Anything that the bot says is not controlled by me. If it says something super out of pocket / weird formatting / something you don't like; rate the message 1 star and refresh it.
